name: Yeji

find.name: Joey relo
find.why: You should meet Joey relo because you both share a passion for experimental sound artistry that could lead to some fascinating conversations and collaborations.

find.name: Aditya Kamboj
find.why: You should meet Aditya Kamboj because his unique take on creativity will inspire you to explore new ways to evoke genuine emotions in your work.
find.match_belief: When someone's motivation becomes sympathetic, you stop inventing heroes and start writing humans.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Truth lands when people stop in your space and suddenly hear their own thoughts like they're part of the sound.
profile.working_on: Installing interactive soundscapes that teach you to listen to what's not being played

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You seek to create moments of introspection, inviting others to discover the depth of their own thoughts through the art of listening.
